titleStmt.title: SII 26.781: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 781. (A.R. No. 730 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājādhirājadēva II: Year 12, Kuṁbha, ba., Thursday, Svātī = 1175 A.D., February 13. The day in the month of Kuṁbha was 21 and the tithi was ba. 5.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of house-site (maṉait-tiḍal) of the extent of 9/16 mā as dharmmadāna to the temple of Śrī-Kayilāsam-uḍaiyār of Śrī-Madhurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Poygai-nāḍu in Vaḍaka[rai]-Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by a certain Tatparamporuḷ-baṭṭaṉ of Vaṅgipuṟam of the village. The signatories were Śeṭṭabhōgan Dakshiṇāmuttibaṭṭa-sōmayājin, Ponnambala-nambi, son of Dāmōdara-baṭṭan of Śiṟukōṭṭaiyūr, Āḷuḍaiyānbhaṭṭan of Kārambiśēṭṭu, Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭan of Neraṭṭūr, Āḷkoḷḷibhaṭṭa-sōmayājin of (place-name lost) and Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭan of (place-name lost).
It is stated at the end that the donor got 10 kāśu as pariśaṭṭam (?) for giving the land, the purport of which is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevaṟkku
yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu kumbhanāiṟṟu Aparapakṣattu coti
yum peṟṟa viyāḻakkiḻamai nāḷ vaṭakarai rājarāja
vaḷanāṭṭu poykaināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīmadhurān=takaccaturvve
timaṅkalattu vaṅkipuṟattu tatparamporuḷpaṭṭaṉeṉ dharmma
dānam Ivūr Uṭaiyār cikayilāsamuṭaiyār koyil Ādiśaṇḍe
śvarappiḷḷaiyārkku śivārtthamāka dhammadānamāka kuṭutta maṉaittiṭal ṉila
māvatu Ivūr teṉpiṭākai Irājagambhirap perāṟṟukku teṟku ne
ṉmaliyāṉa Aḻakiyaceyanallūrk kaṭṭaḷaiil nelmali Ūr
nattattu Ūrkku naṭuviṭṭu meṟku nokkip pona Oḻukkaikku va
ṭakku melācaṟutit teruvil vaṭatalaiil taṭṭān kuṭi Irunta ma
ṉaikku vaṭakku Ayyanār koyilukku teṟkku Ikkoilukku kiḻakkiṭ
ṭut teṟku nokkippona Oḻukaikku meṟkku paḷḷikaḷakkuṭi Iru
ppukki vaṭakkiṭṭu meṟku nokkipona ci ṉāṟmukkaikku vaṭa
kku ciṟukoṭṭaiyūr cāttan cirāmapaṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭu
y Ennutāy Irunta Ūṟpaṭi nilam Araimā munti
ri lam Araimā muntirikaikkum kiḻpāṟkellai Ayyanārkoyi
kiḻai Oḻukkaikku meṟkkum tenpāṟkellai paḷḷikaḷakkuṭi Iru
manaikku vaṭakkil Oḻukkaikkum taṭṭān kuṭi Iruppukkum vaṭa mipā
ṟkellai Ayyaṉār koyilukkut teṟkkum Ivvicaitta pe
ru nāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉainilam Araimā muntirikai
Iṉnilam Araimā muntirikaiyum Ittevar koyilil Āti
caṇṭeśvaratevaṟku dharmmadānamāka kuṭutten taṟparampo
ruḷpaṭṭaneṉ Ivai yenneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven
śeṭṭapogan dakṣiṇāmuttipaṭṭa somayājiyen . Ippaṭi Aṟi
ven ciṟukoṭṭaiyyūr tāmotarapaṭṭan makan ponnampala
nampiyen . Ippaṭi Aṟiven kārampiśeṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyānbhaṭṭanen
neraṭṭur caṅkaranārāyaṇabhaṭṭanen . Ippaṭi
pośana Āḷkoḷḷi bhaṭṭasomayāji ye Aṟi
ven va yār nārāyaṇabhaṭṭanen ....innila
māka kuṭukka Inakku paricaṭṭam Iṭṭa kācu pattu ....
panmāheśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 26.781 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
